title: MultiMizer
description: A Multiplayer Mod-pack made to optimize the game, lower input latency and most importantly give YOU a better experience playing Minecraft! Compatible with Multiplayer AND Singleplayer.
body:
A Multiplayer Mod-pack made to optimize the game, lower input latency and most importantly give YOU a better experience playing Minecraft! 
Compatible with Multiplayer AND Singleplayer.

To convert the .mrpack to .zip, head over to [THIS](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/) link and follow the steps there.

Want more optimizations, for free? Join my [Discord!](https://discord.gg/7sF3jhrCJn)

I've made a comparison below, if you wanna check that out. 

SPECS: 
Intel Core i7 9700K (OC)
RTX 2080 SUPER (OC to the power of 3070 TI) 
16GB 3600MHz RAM.

[Fabric, No mods + Prism Launcher:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93977fd7b9bc2c62531b3040cb7bfd645923ad32.png)


[Fabric, MultiMizer Pack + Prism Launcher:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c0cedbb137094692758b326303aed2294cb1235.png)
